arts.ttl: Marseille condemn 'personal attacks' on Rabiot at PSG
arts.sum: Marseille condemn the "personal attacks" aimed at midfielder Adrien Rabiot and his family during the 3-1 defeat at Paris St-Germain on Sunday.

arts.ttl: ‘I don’t recognise myself’ – Marseille president Pablo Longoria on refereeing outburst at Auxerre
arts.sum: Olympique de Marseille president Pablo Longoria made a rare appearance in his own language today, appearing on radio station Cadena SER. The Spaniard went back over his rant following Marseille’s…

arts.ttl: ‘Expectations & squad balance’ – Pablo Longoria explains why Marseille didn’t sign Paul Pogba last winter
arts.sum: Speaking to Spanish radio station Cadena SER, Olympique de Marseille president Pablo Longoria once again admitted that the club could have signed France 2018 World Cup winner Paul Pogba (31)…

arts.ttl: ‘He told me it would be war’ – Veronique Rabiot on feud with PSG president Nasser Al-Khelaifi
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain president Nasser Al-Khelaifi will tonight be the subject of a France 2 investigative documentary Complément d’Enquête, which is set to look at the Qatari’s influence in French football…

arts.ttl: Marseille duo Adrien Rabiot and Ismaël Bennacer fit to return
arts.sum: Adrien Rabiot (29) and Ismaël Bennacer (27) are both set to make their returns when Olympique de Marseille face Stade de Reims on Saturday. Rabiot played in Le Classique against Paris Saint-Germain…
